title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 1 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 1 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 1 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 01/04/2026
The iron ore market showed a volatile pattern today, with prices fluctuating upward in the morning beforeretreating in the afternoon. The main contract I2605 closed at 812 yuan/ton, up 0.12% from the previous trading session. Spot prices rose by approximately 2 yuan/ton compared to the previous trading day.
